title: Bauer 39140 5 in 1 Men's Grooming Kit/Hair Clippers, Beard, Nose and Ear Trimmer Attachments/All in One USB Rechargeable with Storage Stand
features: 5 IN 1 KIT - This men's grooming kit includes five easily removable attachments for shaving and trimming, plus accessories. The kit contains a T-blade and square blade for your hair and beard, four cutting combs to achieve different hair lengths, in addition to a letter detailer attachment, oil, and a nose & ear trimmer.

HIGH PRECISION - Stainless steel blades provide fast and accurate cutting performance, giving you a smooth and comfortable experience that covers all your hair trimming needs. Customise your hairstyle by selecting from the 4 different clipper grades, number 1, 2, 3 or 4, to achieve your desired hair length.

USB RECHARGEABLE – The kit includes a 1m USB cable to recharge the battery, which lasts up to 50 minutes on a full charge. You can use your kit while it is charging, and it can be charged from either the bottom of the product or when plugged into the stand.

EASY TO USE – The kit includes a freestanding storage stand to hold and display all the included items. It also features an LED battery display that shows the battery percentage when in use and an indicator light when the battery is charging.
BAUER PROFESSIONAL – Bauer Professional is the leading manufacturer of top-quality hair, beauty & personal care products. Browse the whole range at the Bauer Professional page on Amazon today.
description: Product Description Cordless & USB Rechargeable 5 in 1 Men's Grooming Kit This versatile 5-in-1 multi-grooming kit for men includes five interchangeable attachments for shaving and trimming hair, beard, and detailing, along with a nose and ear trimmer. It comes with four cutting combs for customisable hair lengths and high-precision stainless-steel blades that ensure fast, smooth, and comfortable grooming. An LED display shows battery life and charging status, and a freestanding storage stand keeps everything organised and accessible. Previous page 5 Attachments Includes five easily removable attachments for shaving and trimming, plus accessories. Stainless Steel Blades Achieve a quick, close shave with the shaver's stainless steel blades. 4 Clipper Grades Customise your hairstyle by selecting from 4 clipper grades to achieve your desired hair length. USB Rechargeable The kit includes a 1m USB cable to recharge the battery, which lasts up to 50 minutes when charged. Storage Stand Included A freestanding storage stand holds and displays the shaver and accessories. Next page 1 5 Attachments 2 Stainless Steel Blades 3 4 Clipper Grades 4 USB Rechargeable 5 Storage Stand Included
